title: Peel artifact governance gate dependency masks and restore linkage witnesses
intent: Propagate the requirements-first API install pattern to artifact governance gates, then repair the real artifact-linkage verdict exposed after the dependency mask was removed.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Both artifact governance workflows now install requirements.txt before editable package install when PIP_INSTALL_CMD is not overridden. The artifact-linkage witness routes declared in endpoint truth are restored and write governed RMOS artifacts with queryable index metadata. RMOS run summaries now expose kind/id/index_meta so governance scripts can validate lineage through /api/rmos/runs.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The first CI run after the install-order patch proved the dependency mask was peeled: run-artifact-contract-gate passed, while artifact-linkage-gate failed on missing POST /api/saw/batch/toolpaths. This patch addresses that newly visible contract mismatch instead of claiming the install fix closed the gate.

commands_run: GitHub Actions run-artifact-contract-gate on PR #140 head 4eafdc8 passed after install-order patch
GitHub Actions artifact-linkage-gate on PR #140 head 4eafdc8 reached /api/health then failed on POST /api/saw/batch/toolpaths 404, proving dependency mask was removed
pending: Rerun CBSP21 Gate after declaring updated scope
